name: river-flows-in-you
description: A complete real piece: Yiruma's 'River Flows in You', 800 notes converted from MIDI with the tempo map (rubato) and sustain pedal intact, played on the built-in piano instrument through reverb and a -14 LUFS master. examples/midi_to_seq.py is the converter that produced the notes. Replay with: tono replay docs/examples/river-flows-in-you.json

steps.note: One seq, both hands: 800 notes on a 20 ms grid (bpm 60 x 50 steps/beat) so the performance's rubato survives quantisation; pedal-held notes carry their full ring length. The piano voice supplies per-note decay and velocity brightness; env {a:0.002, s:1, r:0.3} just gates key-press/release.
